comments: Sadly the tape flip is in the middle of Streetwalkers ‘Systematic Stealth’ session track.

sessions.details: recorded 1974-06-27 for John Peel (Session #1), first TX 1974-07-04. No known commercial release.
recorded 1976-02-12 for John Peel (Session #9), first TX 1976-03-09. Available on ‘At The BBC (Box Set)’
